productDisplayName: Enamor Glitzies Red Lift Bra DB05
description: Red all lace bra, has medium coverage, wire under the cups for optimum support, detachable straps which are twin in front and single atthe back, bow detail on the straps and in between the cups, an adjustable double hook-and-eye closure on the back Comes with an extra pair of transparent straps Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
